headline: How to watch Nvidia’s Computex keynote
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to deliver GTC Taipei keynote. Watch live at 8PM PT / 11PM ET for major announcements. Rumors hint at a potential Microsoft partnership.

headline: Here’s your first look at ‘A Minecraft Movie Squared’ with Kirsten Dunst as Alex
summary: The Minecraft movie sequel is officially titled 'A Minecraft Movie Squared'. Kirsten Dunst will star as Alex, a key game character. Matt Berry's role is set to expand in the new film.

headline: Feeble Little Horse leans into digital weirdness on bitknot
summary: Feeble Little Horse releases new album 'bitknot'. The LP showcases a fresh, modern edge with digital distortion. The band finds an entirely new sonic gear.

headline: United flight forced to turn around because of a Bluetooth speaker name
summary: A United flight from Newark turned back an hour after takeoff. Security concerns arose from a Bluetooth speaker's name. Crew repeatedly requested passengers to turn off Bluetooth devices.

headline: Everything Coming to Apple TV in June
summary: Discover all the new shows and movies arriving on Apple TV. Subscribers can look forward to a fresh lineup for June. Plan your viewing with this comprehensive list.

headline: The Best Deals Today: AirPods Pro 3, Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair 4K, Evangelion Blu-ray, and More
summary: Find the top deals available right now. Discounts include AirPods Pro 3 and popular media titles. Grab bargains on tech and entertainment essentials.

headline: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Suffers 69% Drop at the Box Office
summary: The Star Wars film 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' experienced a significant box office drop. It fell by 69% in its second weekend. The movie struggled to maintain audience interest.

headline: Backrooms and Obsession Lead the Box Office as Audiences Show Up for Low-Budget Horror
summary: Low-budget horror films 'Backrooms' and 'Obsession' topped the box office. Both YouTuber-directed projects garnered strong audience numbers. This signals a growing appreciation for independent horror.

headline: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
summary: Former Scottish First Minister Nicola Sturgeon denies embezzlement allegations. She told BBC she is being punished for a crime she didn't commit. Sturgeon appeared emotional during the interview.

headline: Sturgeon the master communicator was close to tears - but still faces more questions
summary: Nicola Sturgeon, known for her communication skills, became emotional in an interview. Her former confidence and authority seem to have waned. She continues to face scrutiny and unanswered questions.

headline: Arsenal fans turn streets red for victory parade
summary: Hundreds of thousands of Arsenal fans celebrated their Premier League title win. Supporters lined the streets for a massive victory parade. The triumph ends a 22-year wait for the league title.

headline: Between celebration and confrontation: Paris after PSG victory
summary: Paris witnessed clashes and celebrations following the Champions League final. Nearly 800 people were arrested amid confrontations with police. The city experienced a mix of joy and unrest after PSG's victory.
